summary: Comprehensive testing of Round Table Phase 1 MVP - All 40 backend API tests passed (100%), Frontend UI testing completed successfully with all major features working

issues: HelpTip tooltip can block clicks on title bar buttons - needs z-index adjustment or auto-dismiss

action_items: Consider adding auto-dismiss or click-through for HelpTip tooltips to prevent blocking UI interactions
critical_code_review_comments: Backend code is well-structured with proper auth guards, table membership validation, and _id exclusion from responses
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes on key interactive elements
Theme toggle persists to localStorage correctly
httpOnly cookies are properly set with secure=true and samesite=none for HTTPS preview

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major flows working, minor HelpTip overlay issue)

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple test users created during testing with pattern test_*@roundtable.app

seed_data_creation: Admin user pre-seeded, test users created via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. Frontend flows tested: Login, Portal, TableView, Calendar, Apps, Contacts, Messages, Walkie Talkie, Create Table modal, Dark mode toggle, Registration, Onboarding wizard. File upload tested via API. Per-table data isolation verified (non-members get 403).

backend.auth: POST /api/auth/register, POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me, POST /api/auth/logout - all working with httpOnly cookies
backend.tables: POST /api/tables, GET /api/tables, GET /api/tables/{id}, PUT /api/tables/{id}, DELETE /api/tables/{id} - all working with membership guards
backend.messages: POST /api/messages, GET /api/messages (with user and table_id params) - all working
backend.emails: POST /api/emails, GET /api/emails (folder param), POST /api/emails/{id}/read, POST /api/emails/{id}/star - all working
backend.events: POST /api/events, GET /api/events, PUT /api/events/{id}, DELETE /api/events/{id} - all working
backend.invites: POST /api/invites, GET /api/invites, POST /api/invites/join - all working with proper 404/410 for bad/expired codes
backend.contacts: POST /api/contacts, GET /api/contacts - auto-match with existing users working
backend.upload: POST /api/upload - Emergent Object Storage integration working
backend.guards: Auth guards return 401 without token, Table membership guards return 403 for non-members

frontend.login: Admin credentials pre-filled, login redirects to Portal
frontend.register: Registration form with validation, redirects to /welcome
frontend.onboarding: 5-step wizard with progress bar, Welcome step visible
frontend.portal: 6 widgets (Today's Schedule, Recent on Tables, My Tables, Quick Actions, Invites & Referrals, Notifications) + Communications Hub
frontend.table_view: Round table visualization with wood grain, member seats, LIVE badge, shared items panel, events panel, table chat
frontend.calendar: Monthly grid with April 2026, Today/prev/next navigation, table filter, New Event button
frontend.contacts: On/Not-On Round Table sections, search, Add Contact button, Invite buttons
frontend.messages: Email/Texts/Chat/Walkie tabs, folder navigation, email list with starred items
frontend.walkie: Hold to Talk button, online members list with Select and Ping buttons
frontend.modals: Create Table modal with name/color/live checkbox, closes with Escape
frontend.dark_mode: Theme toggle in title bar, persists to localStorage 'rt-theme'
frontend.title_bar: Traffic lights (red/yellow/green), centered title, theme toggle, notifications bell with count, user avatar

mocked_apis.walkie_audio: MOCKED - UI + beep only, no real audio streaming
mocked_apis.video_call: MOCKED - UI overlay only, no real WebRTC streams
